title: HOMESHOPA Airtight Glass Food Storage Container With Snap Locking Steam Vent Lids, 2 Pack 380ml BPA-Free & Leak Proof Silicone Seal Plastic Clip Lock Lids, Meal Prep Takeaway Lunch Boxes
features: GLASS FOOD STORAGE CONTAINERS:- Discover the ultimate in food freshness with our rectangular Airtight Food Storage Containers with Snap Locking Steam Vent Lids. Designed for both style and functionality, these glass container feature a sleek snap-locking plastic lid that ensures a secure, airtight seal while the built-in steam vent allows for mess-free microwaving. Keep your meals fresh, flavorful, and perfectly stored with ease!

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL:- Our glass meal prep containers are expertly crafted from durable borosilicate glass and come with transparent, BPA-free polypropylene (PP) clip lock lids. This high-quality combination offers superior strength and better temperature resistance compared to standard glass storage options.

AIRTIGHT, LEAK-PROOF & STEAM VENT LIDS:- These BPA-free glass containers feature removable silicone seals and snap-lock plastic lids for a secure, airtight, and leak-proof seal, keeping food fresh and preventing spills. The built-in steam vent allows safe microwaving without splatters, ensuring mess-free reheating without removing the lid. Perfect for easy and efficient meal prep!

SPACE-SAVING STACKABLE:- Maximize your kitchen storage space with our smart stackable design. These leakproof glass containers fit neatly on top of each other, keeping your fridge and pantry organized and clutter-free while making it easy to access your stored food.

OVEN, MICROWAVE, AND FREEZER SAFE:- Our versatile glass containers can safely transition from freezer to oven to microwave, making meal prep and reheating convenient and efficient. Whether you're baking, freezing, or warming leftovers, these containers are up to the task, reducing the need for multiple dishes.

HASSLE-FREE CLEANING:- Enjoy the convenience of easy maintenance with rectangular glass containers that are dishwasher safe. Both the glass body and plastic lids can be placed in the dishwasher, saving you time and ensuring your containers stay spotless after each use.
